# Recommended GitHub Topics

Set these in the repository **About** section (max 20):

```
mcp
model-context-protocol
mcp-server
ai-safety
llm-validation
structured-reasoning
heterogeneous-validation
python
stdlib
cross-validation
ai-agent
cursor
claude-desktop
```

These mirror conventions used by [modelcontextprotocol/registry](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry) and common MCP server listings.
